title: 00_research
description: Research dossier produced by the researcher agent using WebSearch + WebFetch. Iterative, depth-aware web research on the input subject.

topic.description: Subject researched. Extracted from the input if the input is a file/URL/PDF/DOCX; used directly if the input is a topic string.

depth.description: Research depth flag from --depth CLI arg. shallow=1 round/3 queries/5 sources, medium=2/5/10, deep=3/8/15.

queries.description: Search queries issued across all rounds. Round 1 is broad scoping; later rounds target gaps from prior synthesis.

rationale.description: Why this query — what angle or gap it targets.

results_count.description: Number of URLs returned by WebSearch.

sources.description: URLs that were WebFetch'd and excerpted. Deduped by URL.

excerpt.description: 200-500 char excerpt relevant to the research topic.

synthesis.description: Integrated research summary, ~500-2000 words. Weaves findings from all sources. Cites sources inline as [1], [2], etc., where the number maps to the sources array index+1.

key_findings.description: Bullet-style distilled findings — the most important points a reader should remember.

gaps.description: What we still don't know — limitations of this research, topics that returned thin results, areas needing deeper investigation.
